description: Perform a full GDPR compliance audit to address concerns regarding lawful basis for processing, consent mechanisms, and data retention policies.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the audit team is assembled, WHEN the audit is conducted, THEN all GDPR compliance concerns are addressed and documented.

description: Create a system for managing user consent for data collection and processing, ensuring compliance with GDPR requirements.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the consent management system is implemented, WHEN users interact with the platform, THEN they are prompted to provide consent for data collection and processing.

description: Establish data retention policies that comply with GDPR, ensuring that user data is retained only as long as necessary.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the data retention policies are established, WHEN user data is processed, THEN it is retained only for the duration necessary for its purpose.

description: Implement a data ingestion pipeline that captures browsing history, click patterns, scroll depth, and time-on-page metrics for each authenticated user. The pipeline must handle at minimum 50k events/second at peak.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the user is authenticated, WHEN they browse content, THEN their browsing history and click patterns are captured and streamed to the data lake in real-time.

description: Build a recommendation engine that uses accumulated user profile data to serve personalized content suggestions, targeting a 20% improvement in content CTR within 60 days.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN user profiles are available, WHEN the recommendation engine processes the data, THEN it generates personalized content suggestions with a target CTR improvement of 20%.

description: Implement cross-device tracking to link user activity across mobile and web sessions, ensuring a unified user profile.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN a user is logged in on multiple devices, WHEN they interact with content, THEN their activity is linked to their unified profile.

description: Implement monitoring for the Privacy Opt-Out Rate to ensure compliance with user preferences and privacy regulations.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the monitoring system is in place, WHEN users opt out, THEN the opt-out rate is tracked and reported regularly.

description: Create an API and batch export system for sharing anonymized user profile segments with advertising partners, ensuring anonymization to prevent re-identification.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the data export system is implemented, WHEN advertisers request user segments, THEN they receive anonymized cohort-level data without individual identifiers.

description: Build a user-facing dashboard that displays collected behavioral data, allowing users to see their inferred interests and opt out of specific tracking categories.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the user accesses the dashboard, WHEN they view their data, THEN they can see their inferred interests and have options to opt out of specific tracking categories.

description: Implement a mechanism for collecting user feedback on content recommendations and transparency features to continuously improve user experience.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the feedback mechanism is in place, WHEN users provide feedback, THEN it is collected and analyzed for future improvements.

description: Conduct A/B testing to evaluate the effectiveness of different recommendation algorithms on CTR.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the A/B testing framework is set up, WHEN tests are conducted, THEN the results are analyzed to determine the best-performing recommendation algorithm.

description: Allow users to export their data in compliance with GDPR, enabling them to access their personal information.
acceptance_criteria: GIVEN the user requests their data export, WHEN the request is processed, THEN the user receives their personal data in a structured format.
dependencies: story-cross-device-tracking, story-monitor-privacy-opt-out-rate, story-data-export-advertisers, story-user-preference-dashboard, story-user-feedback-collection, story-ab-testing-recommendation-engine
